description: This pipeline reads in a folder with files, lists all subfolders, annotates paths based on the folder name or full path, and filters the paths by their name or absolute path. The main steps include reading in a folder, listing subfolders, annotating paths, and filtering paths.

eb872e43-2214-4902-b9a2-e540a3f3703e.name: path-to-annotation-simple
eb872e43-2214-4902-b9a2-e540a3f3703e.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.

dee7af1c-4ffa-4a54-b92f-8aaa9153d6b9.name: path-filter
dee7af1c-4ffa-4a54-b92f-8aaa9153d6b9.description: Filters the paths (files/folders) by their name or absolute path

afbae2e1-e93a-4b6c-96ff-d0acf23c7d32.name: folder-list-files
afbae2e1-e93a-4b6c-96ff-d0acf23c7d32.description: Lists all files in the input folder

db54ca15-c3c9-470d-90ea-66b8c1ddd28e.name: path-to-annotation-simple
db54ca15-c3c9-470d-90ea-66b8c1ddd28e.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.

89849824-53a6-437f-ab06-9ef6aa51f091.name: path-to-annotation-simple
89849824-53a6-437f-ab06-9ef6aa51f091.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.

90626375-69de-40ab-8a7b-e9d26071ee3c.name: import-folder-list
90626375-69de-40ab-8a7b-e9d26071ee3c.description: Converts each provided path into folder data.
